name: 2026-05-04_Leistungsbeschreibung - TP.2064 KA Jülich.pdf
requirements: REQ-001 [HIGH*] Inventory of existing switchgear and creation of lists: Conduct a thorough inventory of existing switchgear to be replaced. Create comprehensive drive and measurement point lists that fully describe the current state, including power consumption per drive, inrush current, control signals, and on-site control points. This is a special service to be offered.
REQ-002 [HIGH*] Coordination with plant operations: Maintain close coordination with plant operations to define future necessary measurement points and drives.

REQ-003 [HIGH*] Demolition and disposal of old switchgear and cables: Professionally dispose of old switchgear after conversion. Unneeded cables must be cut at the building entry and sealed (muffed). Valuable materials are to be handed over to WVER.

REQ-004 [HIGH*] Renewal of Niederspannungsverteilungen (NSV) and Unterverteilungen (UV): Renew the following switchgear: NSV Rechen, NSV Zulauf, NSV Vorklärung, NSV BioP, NSV Schlammbehandlung, NSV Biologie, NSV Nachklärung, NSV Filtration, UV Sandwäscher, UV Sandfangräumer, and five Haustechnikschränke.
REQ-005 [HIGH*] Flood protection for new switchgear: New switchgear installations must incorporate flood protection measures.
REQ-006 [HIGH*] Reduction of new switchgear physical size: Utilize modern technology and account for removed drives to reduce the physical size of the new switchgear.

REQ-007 [HIGH*] Successive demolition and renewal while maintaining plant functionality: Existing switchgear must be successively dismantled and renewed. The plant must remain fully functional during the entire conversion period, requiring increased effort for temporary installations (Provisorien) and potential for parallel setup.
REQ-008 [HIGH*] Examination of parallel setup possibility for new installations: For all new installations, the possibility of a parallel setup must be examined.

REQ-009 [HIGH*] NSV Rechen relocation and cabling adjustment: The NSV Rechen (4 fields, 200mm plinth) was flooded (40cm) in 2021. A new location must be considered. The existing NYY-J 5x16 mm² supply cable from NSHV must be rerouted, cut, or spliced (muffed) if the location changes. Splicing (Muffen) should be avoided for new installations.
REQ-010 [HIGH*] Limited downtime for Rechen: The Rechen can be out of operation for a few hours depending on weather conditions for the changeover.

REQ-011 [HIGH*] NSV Zulauf, Vorklärung, BioP switchgear renewal: Renew switchgear for Zulaufhebewerk (8 fields, supplied by two NYCWY 5x120 mm² from NSHV, also supplies a UV for Haustechnikschrank) and Vorklärung/BioP (9 fields, supplied by one NYCWY 5x120 mm² from NSHV).
REQ-012 [HIGH*] Optimization of switchgear size for Zulauf, Vorklärung, BioP: Account for unused drives and components to reduce the size of the new switchgear.
REQ-013 [MEDIUM] Consideration of process stage separation: During new planning, it should be considered whether a separation of the process stages (Zulauf, Vorklärung, BioP) is sensible.

REQ-014 [HIGH*] Minimize downtime for process stages (Zulauf, Vorklärung, BioP): Downtime for process stages must be kept as short as possible due to space constraints and the need for temporary installations.
REQ-015 [MEDIUM] Assessment of new location for Zulauf, Vorklärung, BioP switchgear: A new location can be considered if an economic solution is developed.

REQ-016 [HIGH*] Inspection and potential replacement of double floor supports/plates: Switchgear fields are on a double floor that was submerged during the flood. Corroded supports are possible, so double floor supports or plates may need replacement.
REQ-017 [HIGH*] Integration of existing frequency converters (Zulauf, Vorklärung, BioP): Four existing frequency converters currently on the wall must be integrated into the new switchgear.

REQ-018 [HIGH*] NSV Schlammbehandlung and Biologie switchgear renewal: Renewal of switchgear for Schlammbehandlung (14 fields) and Biologie (14 fields). Both are supplied by NYCWY 5x120 mm² from NSHV. Existing supply lines should be retained if possible. Room has double floor with reserve fields, not affected by flood.

REQ-019 [HIGH*] NSV Nachklärung and Filtration switchgear renewal: Renewal of switchgear for Nachklärung (14 fields, supplied by three 5x120 mm² NYCWY from NSHV) and Filtration (25 fields, supplied by five 5x150 mm² NYCWY from NSHV). Limited space in filter building requires provisional setups.

REQ-020 [HIGH*] Variantenuntersuchung for NSV Nachklärung and Filtration location: Due to limited space, a new location (e.g., concrete station) must be considered, and the most economic and technically sensible solution must be worked out.

REQ-021 [HIGH*] Integration of Frequenzumrichter from Zwischenpumpwerk: Frequency converters from the intermediate pumping station (Zwischenpumpwerk) currently on the wall should be integrated cleanly into the new switchgear fields.

REQ-022 [HIGH*] Filter bypass option during conversion and notification to Bezirksregierung: During planning, it must be checked if the filter can be bypassed for the conversion of the process stage. This requires cooperation with operations and notification to the district government (Bezirksregierung).

REQ-023 [HIGH*] UV Sandwäscher renewal: The UV Sandwäscher (hanging cabinet) including its control system must be replaced 1:1. It is supplied from field E6 of switchgear ZP (Chapter 2.2) with a 5x4 mm² supply cable.

REQ-024 [HIGH*] UV Sandfangräumer renewal: The control cabinet for the Sandfangräumer must be renewed. The interface is a terminal box including a repair switch, from which an H07RN-F 12x2.5 mm² cable goes to the cabinet. The location can be retained.

REQ-025 [HIGH*] Haustechnikschränke renewal: Five house technical cabinets (Haustechnikschränke) that were criticized by TÜV must be replaced. Three are in the operations building, one in the mechanical sludge dewatering hall, and one in the filter switchgear room.

REQ-026 [HIGH*] Renewal of supply lines for Nachklärbecken and Vorklärung SRK: Supply lines to the slip ring bodies (SRK) of the four Nachklärbecken and the SRK of the Vorklärung must be renewed. A cable tray structure must be built to lay cables above ground from the circular basin. Lines must be dimensioned according to type plate and distance.
REQ-027 [HIGH*] Renewal of Vorklärung slip ring body (SRK): The slip ring body of the Vorklärung must be renewed, adopting the properties of the existing SRK.

REQ-028 [HIGH*] Demolition of unused measurements and associated cables: Unused measurement equipment must be dismantled, and associated cables pulled back as far as possible. VOST (Vor-Ort-Steuerstellen) may need renewal or supplementation for some drives.

REQ-029 [HIGH*] Cable reuse and management: No network mixing on the plant. Existing cables should be reused if quality is sufficient. If switchgear locations change, cables must be rerouted. Unnecessary splices (Muffen) should be avoided. If existing cables cannot be reused due to insulation damage, they must be replaced.
REQ-030 [MEDIUM] Minor civil engineering works (Tiefbaumaßnahmen): Minor civil engineering works may be required. If so, existing concrete ducts in paved paths can be used.

REQ-031 [HIGH*] Renewal of SPS technology and main SPS: The SPS technology at the wastewater treatment plant must be renewed. New switchgear will be equipped with new controls. The main SPS (Kopf SPS) in the NSHV must also be renewed.

REQ-032 [HIGH*] Integration of existing SPS systems into new program: Existing systems not being renewed (e.g., mechanical sludge dewatering, flocculant station) must be cleanly integrated into the new program.
REQ-033 [HIGH*] Use of Profinet with RJ45 for new installations: New installations should preferably use Profinet with an RJ45 interface.
REQ-034 [HIGH*] Programming with Staußberg and Vosding Toolkit: Programming must be done with the Staußberg and Vosding Toolkit.

REQ-035 [HIGH*] Adaptation of process control system (PLT) and collaboration with WVER IT/PLT: Adaptations to the process control system will be carried out by the executing company. Collaboration with the IT/PLT department of WVER is required.
REQ-036 [HIGH*] Utilization of existing documentation: Outdated wiring diagrams and documents may be provided for the inventory. These plans serve as a rough orientation and are not complete.

REQ-037 [HIGH*] Development of changeover concept for conversion phase: A suitable changeover concept must be developed for the conversion phase. Individual parts of the plant can be taken out of operation for short periods (up to 1 hour). The conversion must be carried out successively in stages.

REQ-038 [HIGH*] Notification to Bezirksregierung for filter bypass: The filter can be bypassed during the conversion period, but this process must be registered with the district government (Bezirksregierung).
REQ-039 [HIGH*] Consideration of energy efficiency for greenhouse gas neutrality: Energy efficiency must be considered in planning to achieve greenhouse gas neutrality by 2045.
REQ-040 [HIGH*] Compliance with WVER meter standards: WVER's meter standards must be observed. For example, sub-distributions and larger drives will be equipped with meters.

REQ-041 [HIGH*] HOAI compliance for remuneration of planning services: The contract will be remunerated according to HOAI 2021 in the service profile 'Technical Equipment', Honorarzone III, Group 4 - High-current systems.
REQ-042 [HIGH*] Cost calculation based on HOAI LP3 requirements: The cost calculation after service phase 3 serves as the basis for fee calculation and must meet HOAI §2 Abs 11 requirements.

REQ-043 [HIGH*] Personnel availability and approval for changes: Personnel specified by the bidder must be available for project execution. Any change in personnel requires notification to the client and written approval.
REQ-044 [HIGH*] Ingenieurvertrag as basis for contractual terms: The provided sample engineering contract forms the basis for minimum contractual requirements.

REQ-045 [HIGH*] Presentation for LP2 and LP3 acceptance: A presentation of results to a relevant client committee is required for the acceptance of service phase 2 (preliminary design) and service phase 3 (detailed design).

REQ-046 [HIGH*] Creation of specification sheet (Lastenheft): Creation of a specification sheet (Lastenheft) which serves as a construction description. This is a 'Besondere Leistung' (special service).
REQ-047 [HIGH*] Review and evaluation of alternative bids: Review and evaluation of alternative bids (Nebenangebote). This is a 'Besondere Leistung' (special service).

REQ-048 [HIGH*] Assistance in reviewing economically justified bids (Claim defense): Assistance in reviewing economically justified bids (Claim defense). This is a 'Besondere Leistung' (special service).
REQ-049 [HIGH*] Monitoring of defect rectification during warranty period: Monitoring of defect rectification within the warranty period. This is a 'Besondere Leistung' (special service).
REQ-050 [HIGH*] Creation of 5 presentations for authorities: Creation of 5 presentations for use by various bodies or authorities. This is a 'Besondere Leistung' (special service).

REQ-051 [HIGH*] Development of contribution trend for changed conditions: Development of contribution trend for changed conditions regarding operating costs, personnel requirements, and power consumption. This is a 'Besondere Leistung' (special service).
clarificationQuestion: The RFP document date is 09.04.2026, but no submission deadline is provided in the available pages, which is a critical missing piece of information for bidding.

matchCandidates.name: Alice Smith

matchCandidates.reason: Diana's UI/UX design expertise is not applicable to the technical requirements of electrical infrastructure renewal and industrial control system programming.

matchCandidates.name: Ethan Hunt

matchCandidates.name: Fiona Gallagher
matchCandidates.reason: Fiona's backend development skills are not suitable for a project focused on industrial electrical systems, PLC programming, and process control.

name: 9d2f2062-accd-49b8-bcf5-c57caab2f612.pdf
requirements: REQ-001 [HIGH*] Existing Switchgear Inventory: Conduct a detailed inventory of all existing switchgear at the Jülich wastewater treatment plant.
REQ-002 [HIGH*] Measuring Point and Drive List Creation: Develop a comprehensive list of all measuring points and drives within the plant.

REQ-003 [HIGH*] NSV Renewal Planning: Plan the renewal of low-voltage distribution systems for specific sections: screens/inlet, primary clarification, BioP, sludge treatment, biology, secondary clarification, and filtration.

REQ-004 [HIGH*] Sub-distribution & Control Cabinet Renewal Planning: Plan the renewal of sub-distribution boards and control cabinets for the sand washer, grit chamber, and five building services cabinets.
REQ-005 [HIGH*] Automation Technology Renewal Planning: Plan the renewal of the overall automation technology.
REQ-006 [HIGH*] Process Control System Adaptation: Adapt the existing process control system to integrate new automation technology.
REQ-007 [HIGH*] Main PLC Renewal Planning: Plan the renewal of the main PLC (Kopf SPS) located in the low-voltage main distribution system (NSHV).
REQ-008 [HIGH*] Cable Infrastructure Planning: Plan the partial renewal of the cable system and the expansion of cable trays.
REQ-009 [HIGH*] Operating Cost Analysis: Determine the operating costs associated with the renewed infrastructure during the planning phase.
REQ-010 [HIGH*] Demand Assessment: Conduct a demand assessment related to the renewal measure during the planning phase.
REQ-011 [HIGH*] Power Consumption Analysis: Analyze the power consumption implications of the renewal measure during the planning phase.
REQ-012 [HIGH*] Quality Control Institute Certification: Provide an AVPQ-Nummer or equivalent certification from quality control institutes.
REQ-013 [HIGH*] Average Annual Workforce: Demonstrate the average annual workforce size (including management) over the last 3 years.

REQ-014 [HIGH*] Professional Liability Insurance Coverage: Maintain a valid professional liability insurance with a minimum coverage of 3.0 Mio. EUR for personal injury, property damage, and financial losses, covering at least 2 claims per year. Coverage must extend to subcontractors.
REQ-015 [HIGH*] Comparable Project References: Provide references for comparable projects from the last 3 years, including service type, contract sum, execution period, and client contact.
REQ-016 [HIGH*] Proof of Tax and Social Security Payments: Provide proof of paid taxes, duties, and social security contributions.
REQ-017 [HIGH*] Specific Annual Turnover: Demonstrate specific annual turnover for services over the last 3 years.
REQ-018 [HIGH*] Relevant Educational and Professional Qualifications: Provide a list of relevant educational and professional qualifications of personnel (Table 2026-03-25_Vorlage Personal).

REQ-019 [HIGH*] Compliance with Tariftreue- und Vergabegesetz NRW: The contractor must comply with the principles of the Tariftreue- und Vergabegesetz NRW (§ 2 Abs. 1-4 TVgG NRW) and ensure compliance by all subcontractors. The client has the right to control and audit this compliance.
REQ-020 [HIGH*] Electronic Communication and Submission: All communication and submission of documents must be exclusively electronic via the Vergabeportal der Wirtschaftsregion Aachen.
REQ-021 [HIGH*] Electronic Financial Transactions: Electronic invoicing, electronic orders, and electronic payments are required.

REQ-022 [HIGH*] Declaration of No Exclusion Reasons: Declare that no severe misconduct according to §§123, 124 GWB has been committed and no exclusion reason according to § 22 LkSG (Lieferkettensorgfaltspflichtengesetz) exists.
REQ-023 [HIGH*] Compliance with VOL/B: The contract execution must comply with VOL/B (Vergabe- und Vertragsordnung für Leistungen – Teil B) and additional contract conditions.
clarificationQuestion: Strict electronic communication and submission requirements; no paper submissions or alternative channels are permitted, requiring robust digital infrastructure.
